---
title: "The Rev. Edmund Riland Williamson"
---

## The Rev. Edmund Riland Williamson

**Dates:**   (1795/6-1864)

### Description

Rector of Campton, uncle of Ann Carter Smith

### Biography

He was educated at Clare College, Cambridge,  succeeded his father as Rector of Campton 1839-64 and founded the Bedford Library; uncle of Ann Carter Smith. [<i>Alumni Cantabrigienses</i>]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
